_readme: Lock-state vocabulary per construction-process artifact type. Source of truth: wiki/system/build-plans/phase-4-envelope.md Rule 4. Read by hooks/guards/lock-state.ts. Edits to artifacts whose lock-state field has a locked value require a revision-history entry dated today, added in the same edit.

adr._readme: Architecture decision records under wiki/system/adrs/. Both Accepted and Decided-Conditional count as locked.

revision_history._readme: How the guard recognizes a today-dated revision-history entry in the new content. The pattern matches the canonical format: hyphen-bullet, two-asterisk-bold, ISO-8601 date, period, two-asterisk-bold close.
